bio: I'm a homebody who is specifically at home in the river. (1725)

bio: Extremely grounded. Literally. In wet mud. I think kindness is underrated in the capybara dating space.

bio: People say I'm easy. They mean it as a compliment and I take it as one. I'm here when you're ready.

name: Victor
